creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thaks for you submission!

I have made a few modifications to your submissions I'd like you to
approve before committing.

I'm attaching the revised shar archive.

Some explanations:

Did add a NAGIOSDIR port just like the nagios port, instead of
hardcoding the /var/spool/nagios directory.

Used the ETCDIR variable to force the port ina  non default one.

Fixed MAN page plist(Man pages should not go to the package plist but
listed in the MANx variables)

Modified the port Makefile and added what is needed to plist and
Makefile to manage configuration files as recommended in the porter's
handbook.

If you have any doubts or questions just ask.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
